title: MITE TUNG GEN DING THU KHAT I NEI HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mite tung gen ding thu khat i nei hi,
Amau lungsim A man hei ding;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zing khuavak sun nitang suak ding hi;
Khazih gam lei tung’ hong tung

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mite tung sak dingla khat i nei hi,
Siatna a zo ding la khat hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mite tung puak ding thu khat i nei hi,
A Tapa hong sawlna thu hi,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mite tung lah ding Honpa i nei hi,
Gimna dahna hong thuah khin hi;
